description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with clean, rectangular forms and a flat roof. The structure is composed of several interlocking box-like volumes, some of which are slightly offset to create visual interest. The exterior is predominantly white, with a few green accent panels that may represent windows or decorative elements. The house sits on a raised platform or base, which is bordered by low walls on three sides. There are no visible traditional roof slopes, and the window arrangement appears sparse and asymmetrical. The entryway is subtle, with no prominent porch or steps, emphasizing the streamlined, contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, minimalist house with flat roofs, white exterior, and green accent panels, composed of interlocking rectangular volumes on a raised platform.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main facade with green accent panels and the layered, boxy structure.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the elongated profile and the sparse placement of green panels along the wall.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the offset volumes and a single green panel, with the raised platform visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the minimal window arrangement and the overall flat, geometric form.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist entryway with no visible porch or steps, integrated into the geometric facade
